textPlain: Argentina already is a regional power and always has been, but to become a superpower or great power there are a whole host of other aspects with regards to power projection needed that Argentina lacks.That said, being a great power or superpower or even a large regional power is orthogonal to having a high standard of living.For example, by most standards, Brazil is a significantly larger and more powerful nation than Argentina, yet the median Brazilian remains much poorer, less educated, and less healthier than the median Argentinian based on developmental metrics.
Let that be a warning to the US. There is no manifest destiny.
More importantly, don’t get dragged down by the pull of fascism (Peron, military juntas, death squads).
